---
name: demo_deploy
description: Describe when to use this prompt
---

<!-- Tip: Use /create-prompt in chat to generate content with agent assistance -->

in the main scene in the demo, for any existing controls that are not in the scene integrate them into the main scene.  If the controls being integrated have a use-case then use them for that purpose otherwise create example names and structures for the controls.  in demo_projects/controls_demo_feature.py add any missing example controls following the layout methods used in that feature.
